curation_notes: Primary location derived from the patch diff: the readObject method in LazyList.SerializationProxy used `init ++: tail` which could evaluate the tail's lazyState Function0 during deserialization. The fix replaces this with `newLL(stateFromIteratorConcatSuffix(it)(tail.state))` to defer evaluation. Stream.scala in the same directory contains an identical readObject pattern with `coll = (init ++: tail)` in its own SerializationProxy, using the same vulnerable deserialization flow through its tlGen function reference. Vulnerability class insecure-deserialization confirmed from CWE-502 and the advisory description of a Java deserialization gadget chain.
